name: Creamless Creamed Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook unpeeled whole onions in salted water with cloves until tender, about 25 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, combine remaining ingredients (butter buds®, flour, skim milk, salt, and pepper) and mix until smooth.
3. Drain onions well and discard cloves.
4. Trim root ends and slip off skins.
5. Heat the sauce, stirring constantly, until thickened.
6. Add cooked onions and heat until finished.
Makes 8-10 servings.
